pi_items.source: setup_task.sh python script generating mechanical 20ms taps and verifier.py exclusion logic

privileged_info_summary: The task generates synthetic finger tapping data via setup_task.sh, including 21 standard participants and one explicitly contaminated participant (P099) with an artificial 20ms tap interval. The expected output file path is /home/ga/pebl/analysis/ftt_fatigue_report.json, explicitly checked by export_result.sh and verifier.py.
